title: phyllanthus subemarginatus
intro: Phyllanthus subemarginatus, also known as the small-leaf phyllanthus or taiwanese phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus subemarginatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate liver and kidney issues, and provide immune system support. It can be prepared as an herbal supplement in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and tea, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects.
